overall.description: First-person walking through a rainy urban street in GTA V, passing the 'White Widow' storefront and stone walls while approaching an archway intersection. Heavy rain creates wet reflective surfaces and atmospheric fog throughout the clip.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk past the White Widow storefront and palm trees

tall palm trees lining the street visible through the rain and fog
black metal bench on the sidewalk near the curb
multi-story commercial buildings with large glass windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy urban corner with the White Widow storefront prominent on the left. The camera walks forward along the wet concrete sidewalk, passing a street bench and palm trees while commercial buildings line the left side. The atmosphere is foggy with heavy rain creating reflective puddles on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with high stone retaining wall and graffiti

events.description: pedestrian in orange shirt walks past the camera on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the stone wall becomes prominent and passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange shirt and dark pants walking toward camera and passing by on the left

entered.detail: tall stone wall with greenery on top running along the left side of the sidewalk
blue and white graffiti tags painted on the stone wall surface
large stone archway structure visible in the distance through the fog

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower sidewalk bordered by a tall stone retaining wall on the left with graffiti tags. The White Widow building falls behind as a pedestrian in an orange shirt approaches and passes by. Palm trees now line the right side near the street, and a large archway structure becomes visible in the foggy distance ahead.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone wall corridor approaching the archway structure ahead

entered.detail: metal water tower structure visible behind buildings on the right
large stone archway with multiple arches spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the graffiti-marked stone wall as the archway structure grows larger in the center of the frame. A water tower becomes visible on the right skyline. The sidewalk remains wet and reflective with heavy rain continuing to fall, and the vegetation on top of the wall becomes more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with archway and vehicle traffic

events.description: large semi truck with colorful advertisement and red sports car visible waiting at the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection near the archway, observing the traffic including a large truck and sports car

red sports car stopped near the semi truck at the intersection

entered.detail: large red semi truck with colorful yellow and red advertisement trailer
shiny red convertible sports car stopped at the intersection
painted white crosswalk lines on the wet asphalt approaching the archway

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the intersection where the stone wall ends, revealing a large semi truck with a colorful advertisement and a red sports car waiting near the archway. The crosswalk becomes visible on the wet asphalt as the archway structure now appears further ahead through the rainy fog, with the water tower still visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy urban corridor that transitions from a commercial storefront area toward a foggy intersection. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk passing the White Widow storefront and palm trees, where heavy rain creates deep reflections in the puddles. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts to a narrower path bordered by a graffiti-marked stone retaining wall on the left, passing a pedestrian in an orange shirt while a large archway emerges in the distance. The camera continues along this wall as the archway grows larger and a water tower becomes visible on the right skyline. Finally, the path opens into an intersection where the stone wall ends, revealing a colorful semi-truck and a red sports car waiting on the wet asphalt beneath the rainy fog.
